findWordLevel1.hint: THE FIRST BOOK OF THE BIBLE.
THE BOOK OF THE DEPARTURE FROM EGYPT.
BOOK OF SONGS AND PRAYERS.
BROTHER OF ABEL AND FIRST SON OF ADAM.
KING OF ISRAEL WHO DEFEATED A GIANT.
LED THE ISRAELITES OUT OF EGYPTIAN BONDAGE.
BIRTHPLACE OF JESUS.
THE VESSEL BUILT BY NOAH.
FATHER OF MANY NATIONS.
THE WISEST KING OF ISRAEL.
ONE OF THE TWELVE FOLLOWERS OF JESUS.
A MESSENGER OF GOD.
HEAVENLY MESSENGER.
GIANT DEFEATED BY DAVID.
JUDGE OF GREAT STRENGTH.
PROPHET IN THE LIONS DEN.
PROPHET SWALLOWED BY A GREAT FISH.
MOTHER OF JESUS.
DENIED JESUS THREE TIMES.
APOSTLE TO THE GENTILES, FORMERLY SAUL.
BUILT THE ARK TO SAVE HIS FAMILY.
SON OF THE PROMISE TO ABRAHAM AND SARAH.
WRESTLED WITH AN ANGEL AND HIS NAME WAS CHANGED TO ISRAEL.
SON OF JACOB SOLD BY HIS BROTHERS WHO BECAME A RULER IN EGYPT.
BROTHER OF MOSES AND THE FIRST HIGH PRIEST.
SUCCESSOR OF MOSES WHO LED THE CONQUEST OF JERICHO.
JUDGE WHO DEFEATED THE MIDIANITES WITH 300 MEN.
LOYAL MOABITE WOMAN ANCESTOR OF KING DAVID.
PROPHET AND JUDGE WHO ANOINTED SAUL AND DAVID.
PROPHET WHO DEFENDED THE FAITH AT MOUNT CARMEL AND WAS TAKEN IN A CHARIOT OF FIRE.
SUCCESSOR OF ELIJAH WHO ASKED FOR A DOUBLE PORTION OF HIS SPIRIT.
LED THE RECONSTRUCTION OF THE WALLS OF JERUSALEM.
TAX COLLECTOR WHO BECAME AN EVANGELIST.
FIRST CHRISTIAN MARTYR FULL OF GRACE AND POWER.
YOUNG DISCIPLE AND CO-WORKER OF THE APOSTLE PAUL.
WIFE OF ABRAHAM AND MOTHER OF ISAAC.
MOTHER-IN-LAW OF RUTH WHO RETURNED TO BETHLEHEM.
SISTER OF LAZARUS AND MARY WHO WAS BUSY WITH HOUSEHOLD TASKS.
FRIEND OF JESUS WHOM HE RAISED FROM THE DEAD.
BELOVED PHYSICIAN WHO WRITE A GOSPEL AND ACTS.
YOUNG EVANGELIST AND CO-WORKER OF PETER AND PAUL.

findWordLevel2.hint: TOWN WHERE JESUS GREW UP.
PLACE WHERE JESUS FASTED FOR 40 DAYS.
SHORT STORY WITH A MORAL LESSON.
SACRED PLACE OF WORSHIP IN JERUSALEM.
THE LAST BOOK OF THE BIBLE, FULL OF PROPHECY.
ONE OF THE TWO MAIN PARTS OF THE BIBLE.
THE HOLY CITY.
THE ANNOINTED ONE.
JEWISH PLACE OF MEETING AND WORSHIP.
BREAD SENT FROM HEAVEN IN THE WILDERNESS.
MOUNTAIN WHERE MOSES RECEIVED THE TEN COMMANDMENTS.
RIVER WHERE JESUS WAS BAPTIZED.
LAND WHERE THE ISRAELITES WERE SLAVES.
GARDEN CREATED BY GOD FOR MAN.
REGION WHERE JESUS CONDUCTED MOST OF HIS MINISTRY.
CITY ON THE WAY TO WHICH SAUL WAS CONVERTED.
CITY TO WHICH PAUL WROTE ABOUT THE ARMOR OF GOD.
CITY WHERE PAUL WAS IMPRISONED AND PREACHED.
CITY TO WHICH THE FAMOUS LOVE CHAPTER WAS WRITTEN.
GOD'S UNMERITED FAVOR FOR SALVATION.
ASSURANCE OF WHAT WE HOPE FOR.
THE GREATEST OF THE FRUITS AND COMMANDMENTS.
FRUIT OF THE SPIRIT THAT TRANSCENDS ALL UNDERSTANDING.
ANCHOR FOR THE SOUL FIRM AND SECURE.
THE ACT OF CLEANSING OUR SINS THROUGH THE BLOOD OF CHRIST.
GIFT OF GOD THROUGH FAITH IN JESUS CHRIST.
PLACE OF CHRIST'S REDEMPTIVE SACRIFICE.
SUPERNATURAL EVENT DISPLAYING GOD'S POWER.
DIRECT COMMUNICATION WITH GOD.
EXPRESSION OF WORSHIP AND GRATITUDE TO GOD.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: IN THE BEGINNING GOD CREATED THE HEAVENS AND THE EARTH
completePhraseChallenges.hint: The first verse of the Bible.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: THE LORD IS MY SHEPHERD I SHALL NOT WANT
completePhraseChallenges.hint: A well-known psalm of trust.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: MAN SHALL NOT LIVE BY BREAD ALONE
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus' reply to the tempter.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: ASK AND IT WILL BE GIVEN TO YOU
completePhraseChallenges.hint: A promise about prayer.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: I AND THE FATHER ARE ONE
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus' declaration of divinity.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: I CAN DO ALL THINGS THROUGH HIM WHO STRENGTHENS ME
completePhraseChallenges.hint: A verse about strength in faith.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: NOW FAITH IS THE ASSURANCE OF THINGS HOPED FOR THE CONVICTION OF THINGS NOT SEEN
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Biblical definition of faith.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: LOVE IS PATIENT AND KIND
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Start of the famous chapter on love.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: COME TO ME ALL WHO LABOR AND ARE HEAVY LADEN
completePhraseChallenges.hint: A beautiful invitation to rest.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: BUT SEEK FIRST THE KINGDOM OF GOD AND HIS RIGHTEOUSNESS
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Sets priorities for the believer.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: LOVE NEVER ENDS
completePhraseChallenges.hint: The quality of love that remains forever.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: I AM THE WAY AND THE TRUTH AND THE LIFE
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus' statement on access to the Father.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: AND YOU WILL KNOW THE TRUTH AND THE TRUTH WILL SET YOU FREE
completePhraseChallenges.hint: The promise of freedom through truth.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: BELIEVE IN THE LORD JESUS AND YOU WILL BE SAVED
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Paul's reply to the Philippian jailer.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: THE LORD IS MY LIGHT AND MY SALVATION WHOM SHALL I FEAR
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Psalm of trust and courage in God.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: CHRIST IN YOU THE HOPE OF GLORY
completePhraseChallenges.hint: The mystery revealed to the believers.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: A SOFT ANSWER TURNS AWAY WRATH
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Proverb about prudence in speech.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: BLESSED ARE THE PEACEMAKERS FOR THEY SHALL BE CALLED SONS OF GOD
completePhraseChallenges.hint: One of the beatitudes from the sermon on the mount.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: TAKE MY YOKE UPON YOU AND LEARN FROM ME
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus invites us to learn from His gentleness.

completePhraseChallenges.fullPhrase: IN THE WORLD YOU WILL HAVE TRIBULATION BUT TAKE HEART I HAVE OVERCOME THE WORLD
completePhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus' words of encouragement before the cross.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: THE LORD IS MY LIGHT AND MY SALVATION
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: Psalm of trust in divine protection.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: I CAN DO ALL THINGS THROUGH CHRIST

guessPhraseChallenges.hint: The quality of love that remains forever.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: I AM THE ALPHA AND THE OMEGA
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: Divine title of the beginning and the end.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: THE TRUTH WILL SET YOU FREE
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus' words on truth and freedom.
Famous opening of the Shepherd's psalm.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: I AM THE WAY THE TRUTH AND THE LIFE
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: Jesus as unique access to the Father.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: BELIEVE IN THE LORD JESUS AND YOU WILL BE SAVED
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: The message of salvation to the jailer.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: MY PEACE I GIVE YOU I DO NOT GIVE TO YOU AS THE WORLD GIVES
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: The singular peace that Jesus grants.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: THE BLOOD OF JESUS HIS SON PURIFIES US FROM ALL SIN
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: The purifying power of Jesus' sacrifice.

guessPhraseChallenges.phrase: DEAR FRIENDS LET US LOVE ONE ANOTHER
THE FEAR OF THE LORD IS THE BEGINNING OF WISDOM
DO IT ALL FOR THE GLORY OF GOD
guessPhraseChallenges.hint: Purpose of every action of the believer.
Declaration of new life in faith.
